pr.title: Improve mnDiagram input and init matching
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2660 improved VS Records mnDiagram matching, mainly by reshaping mnDiagram_InputProc, mnDiagram2_HandleInput, and diagram init paths, adding visible-entry helper use, refining diagram asset/table overlays and signatures, and updating related symbols and headers. Review focused on avoiding data/string/floating-literal regressions, using readable flags, and considering natural loops for moved scan helpers.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source changes: mnDiagram_InputProc reshaping, helper extraction for visible name/fighter scans, asset overlay restructuring, init-path changes, and functions mnDiagram_80243434, mnDiagram_802437E8, mnDiagram_802427B4.
evidence_refs: pr_body: improves mnDiagram_InputProc; matches mnDiagram_80243434 and mnDiagram_802437E8; mnDiagram_802427B4 improves
diff_excerpt: added mnDiagram_GetVisibleNameFrom, mnDiagram_GetVisibleFighterFrom, mnDiagram_FindPrev/Next helpers, mnDiagram_SaveCursorToGameRules

key_files.role: Secondary source changes for mnDiagram2 input matching.
Related mnDiagram3 changes, including data/function matching per report context.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists mnDiagram3 .data and mnDiagram3_80247008 as new matches

key_files.role: Symbol metadata adjustments around mnDiagram3 data split/local strings.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram3_803EEC4C size changed 0x94 to 0x60 and local string symbols @330, @331, @332 added

key_files.role: Menu inline helper update adding GET_DIAGRAM macro.
Header signature/prototype updates tied to recovered diagram functions.
Static header updates for diagram internals.
Static header updates for mnDiagram3 data/signatures.

what_changed.text: Reshaped mnDiagram_InputProc and mnDiagram2_HandleInput to improve matching, with PR-claimed mnDiagram_InputProc score moving from 93.74395% to 98.672615% and mnDiagram2_HandleInput from 89.3421% to 97.460526%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists improvements for mnDiagram_InputProc and mnDiagram2_HandleInput

what_changed.text: Matched mnDiagram_80243434 and mnDiagram_802437E8 according to the PR body, with mnDiagram_802437E8 init path using refined asset/table overlay access and type signatures.
evidence_refs: review_comments: mnDiagram_802437E8 hunk shows arg types changed to u8 and table/assets access changes

what_changed.text: Added local inline helpers for visible-entry scanning and cursor persistence, including mnDiagram_GetVisibleNameFrom, mnDiagram_GetVisibleFighterFrom, mnDiagram_FindPrev/Next helpers, and mnDiagram_SaveCursorToGameRules.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_InputProc calls mnDiagram_GetVisibleNameFrom and mnDiagram_FindPrevName

what_changed.text: Adjusted mnDiagram asset layout names and size assertion, changing grouped asset arrays such as NmB, FaceB, CursorB1, ConB2, ConB3, and CursorB3.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_Assets field changes and STATIC_ASSERT size 0x108 to 0x118

what_changed.text: Added GET_DIAGRAM(gobj) to src/melee/mn/inlines.h as a typed user-data accessor for Diagram.
Updated GALE01 symbols metadata for mnDiagram3_803EEC4C and added local string symbols @330, @331, and @332.

smart_moves.text: Factoring repeated visible-entry scan logic into named helpers made the input handler more reviewable and reusable within the mnDiagram family, while still preserving matching-oriented control flow in the diff excerpt.
The author responded to review by removing a synthetic tail/string table and restoring archive section strings at call sites.
evidence_refs: review_comment by itsgrimetime: Fixed in 15e368d: removed the synthetic tail/string table and restored the archive section strings at the call sites

smart_moves.text: The author responded to review by restoring literal layout floats in mnDiagram_802427B4 and removing generated sdata2 externs.
evidence_refs: metadata review_feedback_examples: Fixed in 15e368d: restored the literal layout floats in mnDiagram_802427B4 and removed the generated sdata2 externs

smart_moves.text: The author responded to review by replacing raw 0x10 visibility masks with JOBJ_HIDDEN.
evidence_refs: metadata review_feedback_examples: Fixed in 15e368d: replaced the raw 0x10 visibility masks with JOBJ_HIDDEN

decomp_lessons.lesson: For code-matching PRs, avoid turning inline archive section strings into a synthetic string/table structure unless the PR has explicit data-ownership evidence; reviewers identified this as a regression that makes review/linking harder.
evidence_refs: review_comment jurrejelle: Don't remove strings, that big data/string table up top is a regression that will make it harder to review
review_comment jurrejelle: Bad, this is a regression and is gonna make it harder to link
review_comment itsgrimetime: Fixed in 15e368d: removed the synthetic tail/string table and restored the archive section strings at the call sites

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not replace ordinary float literals with generated sdata2 externs just to improve data layout; this PR's review explicitly requested not de-inlining floats and the author restored literal floats.
evidence_refs: metadata review_feedback_examples: restored the literal layout floats in mnDiagram_802427B4 and removed the generated sdata2 externs

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a magic bitmask is a known JObj flag, using the named flag improves readability; this PR's raw 0x10 visibility mask was called out and reportedly replaced with JOBJ_HIDDEN.
evidence_refs: review_comment jurrejelle: Maybe replace the 0x10 here with the actual flags that are being cleared for readability?
metadata review_feedback_examples: replaced the raw 0x10 visibility masks with JOBJ_HIDDEN

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated scan helpers with goto-shaped bodies may still be candidates for natural for/while loops; review noted the newly factored visible-entry helpers were probably for loops, though not required for this merge because they appeared to be moved code.
evidence_refs: review_comment jurrejelle: All of these are probably for loops, but since I think you just moved them ig not 100% required to merge
diff_excerpt: helper functions use while plus labels/goto

naming_conventions.text: Typed accessor macro naming follows existing GET_MENU style: GET_DIAGRAM(gobj) casts HSD_GObjGetUserData(gobj) to Diagram*.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: inlines.h has GET_MENU and added GET_DIAGRAM

naming_conventions.text: Helper names in this PR use mnDiagram_ verb phrases describing visible-entry navigation: GetVisibleNameFrom, GetVisibleFighterFrom, FindPrevFighter, FindNextFighter, FindPrevName, FindNextName, and SaveCursorToGameRules.
Asset overlay field names were refined toward archive section component names such as NmB, FaceB, CursorB1, ConB1, ConB2, ConB3, and CursorB3.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used helper extraction/inlining to share repeated visible-name and visible-fighter scan patterns while improving mnDiagram_InputProc source shape.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: static inline helpers added immediately before mnDiagram_InputProc

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used PAD_STACK in mnDiagram_InputProc with changed padding from 72 to 64 in the excerpt; no reviewer evidence in the loaded slice explains the necessity, so treat this only as observed matching tactic use.
Adjusted function signatures/types where the PR body says type signatures were refined, including mnDiagram_802437E8 changing parameters from s32 to u8 in the shown hunk.
evidence_refs: review_comments hunk: void mnDiagram_802437E8(s32 arg0, s32 arg1) to void mnDiagram_802437E8(u8 arg0, u8 arg1)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Updated symbol metadata for mnDiagram3 data size and local strings to support data/function matching around mnDiagram3.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt size/local string symbol updates
text_corpus: bot report shows mnDiagram3 .data reached 100%

review_feedback.feedback: Do not remove strings into a big data/string table; reviewer called it a regression that would make the PR harder to review.
review_feedback.resolution_in_slice: Author said fixed in 15e368d by removing the synthetic tail/string table and restoring archive section strings at call sites.

review_feedback.feedback: Replace raw 0x10 JObj flag masks with the actual flag name for readability.
review_feedback.resolution_in_slice: Metadata notes author fixed by replacing raw 0x10 visibility masks with JOBJ_HIDDEN.

review_feedback.feedback: Do not de-inline floats into generated symbols/externs.
review_feedback.resolution_in_slice: Metadata notes author restored literal layout floats in mnDiagram_802427B4 and removed generated sdata2 externs.

review_feedback.feedback: Visible-entry helper bodies are probably for loops, though not fully required if they were only moved code.
review_feedback.resolution_in_slice: No explicit final code excerpt proving conversion to loops; keep as follow-up/lesson candidate only.

review_feedback.feedback: Synthetic data tail/string table was called bad, a regression, and harder to link.
review_feedback.resolution_in_slice: Author later said synthetic tail/string table was removed.

follow_up_queries: PR2660 mnDiagram synthetic tail string table regression

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, changed files, counts
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: representative hunks for symbols, inlines.h, mndiagram.c
review_comments_excerpt/text_corpus: reviewer comments and author fix notes
notes: Loaded review_comments and raw_diff are truncated, so later final-state details for some hunks are represented from metadata review_feedback_examples rather than full final diff.
The PR body claims verification commands and matching improvements; this intake records those claims as PR evidence, not independently rerun validation.
The slice provides no complete final diff confirming every review fix, but author fix comments and metadata examples support the main regression resolutions.
No tool lookup was needed because the loaded PR evidence and standards answered the intake questions.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Avoid synthetic string/data tables in focused code-matching PRs
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2660, moving archive section strings into a synthetic tail/string table in mnDiagram was reviewed as a regression that made the PR harder to review/link; the author reported restoring strings at lbArchive_LoadSections call sites.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep ordinary float literals inline unless data ownership is proven
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2660 review rejected replacing mnDiagram_802427B4 float literals with generated mnDiagram_804DBFxx symbols; the author restored literal layout floats and removed generated sdata2 externs.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use named JObj flags instead of raw visibility masks
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2660 review asked to replace raw 0x10 masks passed to HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll/HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll with the actual flag; metadata says the author replaced them with JOBJ_HIDDEN.

source_update_candidates.title: Mention review-backed rejection of de-inlining floats into generated sdata2 externs
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2660 is a concrete example for the existing literals/data standards: reviewers rejected replacing inline floats in mnDiagram_802427B4 with generated mnDiagram_804DBFxx symbols, and the author restored literal floats.
evidence_refs: metadata: Fixed in 15e368d restored literal layout floats and removed generated sdata2 externs
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be added as an example under existing standards rather than a new rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Use named engine flags when replacing raw masks is supported
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2660 review requested replacing raw 0x10 JObj visibility masks with the actual flag name, and metadata says JOBJ_HIDDEN was used.
evidence_refs: review_comment jurrejelle: Maybe replace the 0x10 here with the actual flags
metadata: replaced raw 0x10 visibility masks with JOBJ_HIDDEN
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards cover macros/typed access broadly, but this is a useful concrete flag-readability example.

source_update_candidates.title: Synthetic data/string tables can be regressions in focused code matches
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2660 review called a synthetic mnDiagram tail/string table a regression that made review/linking harder; the author removed it and restored archive strings at call sites.
evidence_refs: review_comment jurrejelle: Bad, this is a regression...
author fix comment: removed the synthetic tail/string table
source_update_candidates.reason: Supports existing standards with a concrete PR example.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR's matching percentages as independently validated by this intake; they are PR/body/bot-report evidence only.

Do not infer that all newly added visible-entry helpers should be rewritten as for loops in the final source; the reviewer said probably for loops but not required, and the loaded final diff is truncated.
Do not mark PAD_STACK(64) as an accepted permanent tactic; the slice shows it but does not provide reviewer or objdiff-specific justification beyond the PR's general build/report claims.
Do not treat the symbols.txt local string updates as a general data-splitting rule; only record them as changed metadata in this PR.
